chunks.text: Paper by Rick Garcia and Avideh Zakhor wins SPIE 2016 Best Paper Award - EECS at Berkeley EECS alumni Rick Garcia and Prof. Avideh Zakhor won the best paper award at the SPIE Electronic Imaging Conference on 3D Image Processing measurement. Their paper titled “Markerless Motion Capture With Multi-view Structured Light” is also the title of Rick’s Ph.D. thesis. Categories Alumni Faculty Honors Research View Open Faculty Positions
